name: Standard user successful login with valid credentials
preconditions: Application is accessible and the login page is reachable
The account 'standard_user' exists and is active
No active session exists for the user (browser cookies/session cleared)

steps.action: Navigate to the application root URL
steps.expected: The Login Page is displayed with a username field, password field, and a 'Login' button visible

steps.action: Enter the username into the Username input field
steps.expected: The text 'standard_user' appears in the Username field with no error styling

steps.action: Enter the password into the Password input field
steps.expected: The password field displays masked characters (dots or asterisks) and no error styling is present
The form is submitted; the browser navigates away from the login page

steps.action: Verify the current URL after redirection
steps.expected: The browser URL contains '/inventory.html', confirming the user has been redirected to the Products Page

steps.action: Verify the page header title is displayed
steps.expected: A heading with the text 'Products' is visible on the page

steps.action: Verify the product inventory list is displayed
steps.expected: At least one product item (with name, description, and price) is rendered on the Products Page

steps.action: Verify no error messages are present on the page
steps.expected: No error banners, alerts, or inline validation messages are visible anywhere on the Products Page

postconditions: User 'standard_user' is authenticated and an active session exists
User is on the Products Page (/inventory.html)
Session/cookies should be cleared after test execution to avoid state leakage
